title: Starfall - The End Expansion
description: Completely transforms and overhauls the End dimension, creating an ethereal new world of mystery and beauty to explore.
body:
![Starfall](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/05258465c9dbaef120ee8ebf19591fb0337f741e.png)

**Explore a reimagined End dimension filled with ethereal and magical biomes. Adventure across new lands, parkour around mini islands, create epic builds with the new blocks, and much more.**

## **About:**

Starfall fully overhauls and reimagines the vanilla End dimension and creates a brand new world to explore, with vanilla-friendly features and game mechanics that blend into the End dimension better than ever before. Unlike other end-upgrading mods, this one keeps the original End islands generation - but layers amazing and ethereal new biomes over them, changing the generation for each seperate landscape. Explore the rolling hills of the Ethereal Meadows, wander around a Hollow Grove to build with new wood types. Parkour around the Shattered Isles, explore four new structures for unique loot (and unique traps), or ride on a floating Leviathan to fight an army of Phantom Wisps!

## **Features:**

- 21 new blocks
- 4 new mobs
- 5 new biomes
- 4 new structures
- 14 new items

## **New Mechanics:**

 - Who needs Happy Ghasts? Older versions get a buff with huge floating Leviathans! If you can       find one, consider yourself lucky! They don't show themselves often.
- Ghost blocks are finally in vanilla! Kill Phantom Wisps to get a block of Phantom Crystals, which have no hitboxes! You can make secret entrances or parkour challenges with these new blocks.
- New light sources! Kill an Ender Beetle (you monster! They're so cute!) to get a Beetlelight, a new purple lamp to light up your bases. For a less agressive solution, mine a floating chunk of Stardust blocks and combine them with torches, and you'll have yourself a Star Lamp, a white, rocky material that emits strong light. These can also be found in the new structures! Speaking of which...
- Better loot than ever in the brand new structures! Find Luminite crystals, diamonds, smithing templates, netherite ingots, and more. You can also find some books that may have some clues about the mysterious story of the mod...
- New armour, tools and weapons! Luminite is now the strongest material in the game, and can be upgraded from diamond armour using a smithing table and new template. It can be found in large deposits scattered around the dimension, but you'll need to find a lot of it before you can make pristine crystals and upgrade your gear!  

## **Credits:**

Made entirely by FoxiMakesMods! (Subscribe to my youtube at @FoxiPlaysMinecraft!)
Created using MCreator!
This isn't my first mod, but it's the first one I've put here on Modrinth!
The mod will not recieve any more updates (the mod file is corrupted, sadly!) I'm sorry! :(
